# Clarusto Logistics

> Clarusto Logistics is a global freight forwarding and supply chain company offering air freight, customs brokerage, customs clearance, and ecommerce logistics.

## Services
- Air Freight: International air cargo solutions for time-sensitive shipments
- Customs Brokerage: End-to-end customs documentation and compliance
- Customs Clearance: Fast and accurate clearance at major ports and airports
- Ecommerce Logistics: Fulfillment and last-mile delivery for online retailers
- Transportation Services: Multimodal road, sea, and air logistics support

## Contact
- Phone: +44 3300946908
- Website: https://clarustologistics.com

## About
Based in the UK and serving global clients across major trade lanes.
